constraints.name: warnExpiredLicense
constraints.messageTemplate: Driver '{driverName}' has an expired license — suspend or renew before dispatching

value.value: Cannot remove a driver currently on route
Only available or on-route drivers can be set off duty
Only off-duty or inactive drivers can be reactivated
Only out-of-service vehicles can be deleted
Vehicle must be available or out of service to send to maintenance
Vehicle is already out of service
Cannot decommission a vehicle currently in use
Cannot delete a route in progress
Can only update a planned route
Only a planned route can be started
Route must be in progress to complete a stop
Route must be in progress to record a delay
Delay must be a positive number of minutes
Only an in-progress route can be completed
Only planned routes can be optimized
Dispatch must be assigned before departing
Dispatch must be in transit to mark delivered
Dispatch must be in transit to mark as failed
Can only reassign a pending, assigned, or failed dispatch
